name: Radio Buttons
summary: Radio button group using `enum` in data schema and `format: radio` in UI schema
whenToUse: Selecting one option from 2-4 predefined choices
When all options should be visible at once without opening a dropdown
notes: Set `options.format` to `"radio"` to render enum values as radio buttons instead of dropdown
Radio buttons are best for 2-4 options; use dropdowns for longer lists
